place_beacon.title: Build a full beacon pyramid (base: iron, gold, diamond, or netherite blocks) and activate it

subtitle.text: The star makes the pyramid. The pyramid makes the light. The light changes everything in range.

description: The Beacon is the Nether Star's primary use case.
Craft it: Nether Star + 3 Obsidian + 5 Glass.
Tier 1: 9 blocks — one effect (Speed, Haste, Resistance, Jump, Strength)
Tier 4: 81 blocks — max effects + secondary effect
Haste II + Speed II is the mining and exploration setup.
Strength II is the combat setup.
Resistance + Regeneration is the survival setup.
The factory produces what you need to build the pyramid.
The pyramid then amplifies the factory worker.
→ Build a full pyramid and activate it [check]
